title: tui::app::App is a God Object — 22 fields spanning transport, session, UI, hooks, memory
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Structural Modularity (SRP)
Location: src/tui/app.rs:249-287
Violation: Single struct owns HTTP client, endpoint, headers, system prompt, prompt_blocks, OAuth token, memory DB, session messages, tokio runtime handle, chat session, pending permission, hook engine, rules content, and UI state (messages, input, tokens, spinner, should_quit, is_waiting). This is 22 fields with wildly different rates of change. Every new command or provider concern pulls in this struct.
Mandated Refactor: Decompose into (a) ApiClient { client, endpoint, headers, provider, model, claude_code_token, prompt_blocks }, (b) SessionState { chat_session, session_messages, rules_content, rules_injected, tokens }, (c) UiState { messages, input, spinner_frame, is_waiting, should_quit, pending_permission }, (d) Services { hook_engine, memory_db, runtime_handle, api_event_tx }. The App becomes a thin coordinator that owns these four and routes events. This is the prerequisite for every other TUI refactor.
